body:
## Scope
Add comprehensive tests for `aragora/swarm/roadmap_priority.py` covering roadmap code extraction, priority classification, and the Do now/Delay/Avoid policy.

## Why (docs proof drift and roadmap truth)
The roadmap priority policy drives queue governance. Comprehensive tests ensure CS-01..03 enforcement stays accurate as the roadmap evolves.

## Files
- Add tests to `tests/swarm/test_roadmap_priority.py`

## Acceptance
- `pytest tests/swarm/test_roadmap_priority.py -v` passes
- Coverage for: extract_roadmap_codes, priority_for_text, blocks_boss_ready

title: [CS-01] Add roadmap priority policy classification tests
